overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant futuristic metropolis with towering neon-lit skyscrapers, palm-lined boulevards, and busy streets. The character crosses a major intersection and continues along sidewalks amidst moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to commercial tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a dark glass building, approaching an intersection with steam rising from street vents

notable_agents.action: man in dark shirt walking ahead of the camera at a steady pace

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent blue 'FOURTH WALL' signage and green awnings across the street
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a female character in purple and pink neon
steam rising from ground vents in the middle of the intersection ahead
tall dark building with reflective glass windows running alongside the sidewalk
horizontal traffic light fixture mounted on a tall pole at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded sidewalk beside a towering dark glass building, approaching a busy intersection. Across the street, the 'Fourth Wall' building displays vibrant neon advertisements while steam rises from street vents. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction as the camera follows a man walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with palm-lined boulevard ahead

events.description: traffic light changes to green, allowing pedestrians to begin crossing the intersection
character steps off the crosswalk onto the opposite sidewalk with red pavement

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians as the traffic signal changes to green

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians including a person in yellow jacket crossing from the left side

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
row of tall palm trees lining the opposite sidewalk ahead

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide sunlit intersection as the traffic light turns green, moving from the shaded sidewalk into an open crosswalk. The perspective opens up to reveal palm trees lining the opposite boulevard and the 'Fourth Wall' building now visible to the left. Other pedestrians cross simultaneously from different directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined boulevard with digital billboards and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past palm trees and large digital advertisements, with parked cars to the left

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying 'MEET THE NEW YOU' advertisement with a female figure
line of futuristic vehicles parked along the curb including beige and green sedans
yellow elevated pedestrian walkway bridge spanning across the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a wide sunlit boulevard lined with palm trees on the right and parked futuristic vehicles on the left. Large digital billboards including one reading 'MEET THE NEW YOU' dominate the building facades. In the distance, a yellow pedestrian overpass spans the street while the camera maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street approaching pedestrian overpass with active traffic

events.description: pedestrian with distinctive blue face paint walks past the camera temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past orange safety railings as vehicles pass by on the left, approaching the yellow pedestrian overpass

notable_agents.action: person with blue face paint and white clothing walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: bright orange metal safety railings separating the sidewalk from the street traffic
stream of futuristic cars and trucks driving along the multi-lane road including a green sedan and white coupe

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a busier section of the boulevard with orange safety railings separating the sidewalk from moderate traffic. The yellow pedestrian overpass grows larger as the camera approaches. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one with distinctive blue facial markings who passes close to the camera. Futuristic vehicles stream by on the left while digital billboards continue to line the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor into a wide, sun-drenched futuristic boulevard. It begins on a shaded sidewalk beside a towering dark glass building, following a man toward a busy intersection where steam rises from street vents and neon advertisements glow on the Fourth Wall building. As the traffic light turns green, the camera moves from the shadows into a bright, open crosswalk, revealing palm trees and other pedestrians crossing from multiple directions. The scene then expands onto a wide boulevard lined with parked futuristic vehicles and massive digital billboards, including one reading MEET THE NEW YOU, while a yellow pedestrian overpass appears in the distance. Finally, the camera approaches the overpass along a busier stretch of sidewalk separated by orange safety railings, passing a pedestrian with blue facial markings as futuristic traffic streams by.
